privacy_policy.title: Information We Collect
privacy_policy.description: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, company details, and any information you voluntarily provide. We also collect technical information including IP address, browser type, device information, and usage data.

privacy_policy.title: How We Use Information
privacy_policy.description: To provide, maintain, and improve our services; respond to inquiries; process requests; and send important updates where permitted by law.

privacy_policy.title: Information Sharing
privacy_policy.description: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. Data may be shared with trusted third-party providers under strict confidentiality agreements.

privacy_policy.title: Data Security
privacy_policy.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

privacy_policy.title: Your Rights
privacy_policy.description: You have the right to access, update, or request deletion of your personal data. Contact us at vihil3010@gmail.com to exercise your rights.

terms_of_service.title: Use of Services
terms_of_service.description: By using our services, you agree to comply with all applicable laws. You may not misuse the platform, attempt unauthorized access, or disrupt other users.

terms_of_service.title: Intellectual Property
terms_of_service.description: All content, trademarks, and designs are owned by or licensed to Vihil InfoTech. Reproduction or distribution without written permission is prohibited.

terms_of_service.title: Limitation of Liability
terms_of_service.description: We shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Total liability shall not exceed amounts paid by you for the services.

terms_of_service.title: Governing Law
terms_of_service.description: These terms are governed by the laws of the applicable jurisdiction. Disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that jurisdiction.

faqs.question: What services does Vihil InfoTech offer?
faqs.answer: Vihil InfoTech offers web development (React, Next.js, Node.js), mobile app development (React Native, iOS, Android), AI/ML integration (LLMs, RAG, generative AI workflows), cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure), cybersecurity (audits, penetration testing), SEO & digital marketing, PWA development, desktop app development (Electron), chatbot development, and e-commerce solutions (Shopify). We provide end-to-end solutions from product discovery to launch and long-term support.

faqs.question: What technologies does your team specialize in?
faqs.answer: We specialize in React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, PHP, Python, FastAPI, LangChain, React Native, Android, iOS, TypeScript, JavaScript, Electron, Shopify, and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure). For AI/ML, we work with LangChain, RAG pipelines, LLM integrations, and generative AI workflows.

faqs.question: How experienced is your team?
faqs.answer: Our team has 5+ years of expertise, 100+ tech experts, and has served 50+ clients across 10+ countries, delivering 100+ projects. We maintain a 4.8/5 average CSAT score, 86% repeat engagement rate, and 94% on-time milestone delivery.

faqs.question: Can you handle both small projects and large-scale enterprise solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work with startups building their first MVP as well as large enterprises undergoing digital transformation. Our flexible engagement models include fixed-scope sprints, dedicated product teams, and staff augmentation.

faqs.question: What is your development process?
faqs.answer: Our process follows 5 stages: Research → Plan → Implement → Test & Deliver → Optimize. We use agile Scrum and Kanban methodologies with full transparency, regular sprint reviews, and outcome-oriented delivery.

faqs.question: Do you integrate AI and ML into products?
faqs.answer: Yes. We integrate AI/ML through LLM assistants, RAG-based knowledge search, generative AI workflows, data intelligence layers, and intelligent automation using FastAPI, LangChain, Node.js, and cloud platforms.

faqs.question: How do you ensure the security of the projects you undertake?
faqs.answer: Security is a top priority. We conduct security audits, implement secure coding practices, perform penetration testing, review compliance requirements, and offer dedicated cybersecurity services including application hardening and secure architecture design.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support and maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer post-launch support, maintenance, and continuous optimization. Our team is available to address issues, implement updates, and help your product scale over time.

faqs.question: How can I get a quote for my project?
faqs.answer: You can reach us by emailing vihil3010@gmail.com, calling +91 70164 21339, or booking a strategy call via www.vihilinfotech.com. We reply within 2 hours. The call is 30 minutes, NDA-friendly, and includes tech suggestions and a transparent timeline and cost direction.

faqs.question: Where is Vihil InfoTech located?
faqs.answer: We are located at 207, Sky Tatva - I, Opposite Amba Ashram, College Road, Nadiad, Gujarat - 387001, India.

faqs.question: What sets Vihil InfoTech apart from other IT service providers?
faqs.answer: Our differentiators are: AI-first thinking built into every product, scalable modular architecture, reliable agile delivery with 94% on-time milestones, 86% client repeat rate, and a product-focused approach that merges business strategy with engineering execution.

faqs.question: Can you provide references or case studies of previous projects?
faqs.answer: Yes. Contact us at vihil3010@gmail.com and we'll share relevant case studies and references based on your industry and project type.

faqs.question: What industries do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Healthcare & Healthtech, Education & E-learning, FinTech & Banking, Retail & E-commerce, Logistics & Supply Chain, SaaS & B2B Platforms, Manufacturing & IoT, Real Estate, Sports & Fitness, and Finance.

faqs.question: Do you build chatbots and AI assistants?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build intelligent chatbots and AI assistants using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and LangChain. These can be used for customer support automation, lead qualification, internal knowledge assistants, and workflow automation.

faqs.question: Do you develop Shopify and e-commerce solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes. We handle Shopify builds and customization, custom storefront development, and payment and subscription flow integrations.

faqs.question: What engagement models do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer startup MVP builds, enterprise digital transformation, dedicated product teams, staff augmentation, fixed-scope agile sprints, and ongoing support & scale engagements.

faqs.question: How can I schedule a call?
faqs.answer: You can book a 30-minute strategy call via www.vihilinfotech.com or email vihil3010@gmail.com. Calls are conducted on Google Meet or Zoom, with a meeting link and agenda shared right after confirmation. The call covers tech suggestions, a delivery plan, and a transparent cost direction — all NDA-friendly.
